expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Add notification center with persistent read state, badges, list, filtering, and clearing",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Persist notification read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification read/unread state persisted so read status survives sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": ["Add storage for read state per user and notification", "Migration or schema changes applied safely", "Typecheck passes"],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["db/migrations/", "src/models/notification.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Show unread badge and notification list UI",
      "description": "As a user, I want an unread badge and ability to open notification list so I can see alerts.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": ["Badge shows unread count", "Click opens notification list", "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill", "Typecheck passes"],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/components/NotificationBadge.tsx", "src/components/NotificationList.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Mark notifications read/unread",
      "description": "As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so I manage attention.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": ["API to mark read/unread updates persistent state", "UI actions reflect state without data loss", "Typecheck passes"],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/services/notificationService.ts", "src/routes/notifications.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Filter notifications by read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter notifications by read/unread so I can focus on unread items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": ["Filter options: All, Unread, Read", "Filter applied client-side or via query", "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill", "Typecheck passes"],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/components/NotificationList.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Clear all read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so I can tidy my list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": ["Button to clear read notifications removes them from list and storage", "Action recorded in audit or logs if required", "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill", "Typecheck passes"],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/pages/NotificationsPage.tsx", "src/services/notificationService.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
